Anvil

Practice DSA
offline.

An installable desktop app for coding-interview & DSA practice.

Read a problem · write code · run tests locally — no internet, no account.

Tauri Next.js Rust MIT
def two_sum(nums, target):
  seen = {}
  for i, n in enumerate(nums):
    if target - n in seen:
      return [seen[target-n], i]
    seen[n] = i
12 / 12 tests passed
